text.title: AI Elicitation Prompt Patterns Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a prompt-pattern deliverable. Subagent must satisfy this before returning.

example.title: Valid interview-prep pattern
example.code: { "pattern_id": "interview-prep-v1", "phase": "interview-prep", "slots": [ {"name": "stakeholder_role", "type": "string", "required": true}, {"name": "project_brief", "type": "string", "required": true}, {"name": "prior_artefacts", "type": "list", "required": false} ], "skeleton": "You are preparing an elicitation interview for {{stakeholder_role}}. Brief: {{project_brief}}. Draft 8 open questions...", "output_schema_ref": "templates/output-schema.json#/interview_questions", "eval_reference": "evals/interview-prep-v1.jsonl", "budget": {"tokens_in": 800, "tokens_out": 400, "cost_usd_cap": 0.05}, "version_tag": "v1.0.0" }
example.note: Slots typed; output schema referenced; eval set linked; budget capped; version pinned.

example.title: Invalid — free-text without schema
example.note: pattern_id wrong case, no slots, no schema, no eval, no budget, version_tag not semver.

list.item: untracked prompt edits — every change bumps version_tag (rule r3)
budget unset or tokens_out unbounded (rule r4)
Pin to provider quirk only when documented in slots[].provider_specific_note.
